title: LIVIA ESSENTIALS ( UNOFFICIAL )
description: A lightweight client-side modpack made for the Livia SMP. Livia Essentials improves performance, adds proximity voice chat with Plasmo Voice Chat, and enhances visuals and smoothness.
body:
# About Livia Essentials

The Livia Essentials modpack is designed to enhance the Minecraft experience specifically for players on the Livia SMP server, while still remaining fully compatible with any other vanilla-style server. This pack focuses on performance improvements, smooth client-side enhancements, and immersive proximity voice chat powered by Plasmo Voice Chat—all without changing the core vanilla gameplay.

### Key Features
- **Performance Optimization**

> Carefully selected performance-focused mods help Minecraft run smoother and more efficiently. Whether you’re exploring massive terrain or participating in large community events, these enhancements ensure stable and responsive gameplay—even on lower-end systems.

- **Proximity Voice Chat (Plasmo Voice Chat)**

> With Plasmo Voice Chat integrated, players can communicate naturally with others nearby in the world. This adds immersion, encourages collaboration, and strengthens the social experience at the heart of Livia SMP.
> 
- **Server-Friendly Enhancements**
  
> Although tailored for Livia SMP, all included mods maintain the feel of vanilla Minecraft. They improve quality of life, reduce lag, and enhance visuals and performance—without introducing gameplay changes that would affect balance or compatibility.

## Why Use This Modpack?

This pack is for players who want the best experience on Livia SMP without drifting away from the authentic vanilla feel. It boosts performance, makes multiplayer interactions more engaging through proximity voice chat, and ensures full compatibility with the server’s settings and community playstyle.

While it works on other vanilla-friendly servers, we recommend installing it primarily if you plan to play on Livia SMP to get the intended experience.
